title: [Breaking Bread]
description: Tall stacks of burlap bags partially block the iron-framed windows of the shop, the wood-planked floor below them covered in a dusting of various flours and oats.  A riveted oak half-barrel sits to the side of a long marble-topped counter, its pristine surface interspersed with folded cloths and oiled stone bowls alongside several vellum-paged tomes.  Set against the back wall is a ceiling-high canvas sketched with an oversized loaf of bread alongside several notes listing the individual components.
